home.title: Home
home.description: DFREE Africa - Empowering communities with financial freedom and sustainable development across the African continent.

finfest.title: FinFE$T
finfest.description: FinFE$T is DFREE's free financial festival for everyone. Learn how to make, manage, and build wealth from industry professionals at our community event.

africa.title: Africa
africa.description: Empowering Africa - Driving financial freedom and sustainable community development through education, skills training, and economic programs.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Explore DFREE Africa's transformative projects across Ghana, South Africa, Uganda, and Liberia.

project.title: Project
project.descriptionFallback: Learn more about this DFREE® project.

ghana.title: Ghana
ghana.description: DFREE® in Ghana - Financial freedom in the workplace and church, partnerships, and community development across Ghana.

southAfrica.title: South Africa
southAfrica.description: DFREE® in South Africa - Partnerships, financial literacy, and community development with the Baptist Convention of Southern Africa and local organizations.

billionDollarChallenge.title: Billion Dollar Challenge
billionDollarChallenge.description: Eliminate debt, build savings, and take control of your financial future through the DFREE® Billion Dollar Challenge—a digital platform built on community accountability.

communityCampaigns.title: Community Campaigns
communityCampaigns.description: Dynamic community-wide campaigns that unite churches, civic groups, and local organizations to implement synchronized DFREE® financial empowerment programs.

accessScholarships.title: Access Scholarships
accessScholarships.description: The DFREE® Access Scholarship offers free access to courses, materials, coaching, and events, helping participants achieve financial stability and empowerment.

footer.stayConnected: Stay connected with our latest updates and transformative work
footer.privacyNote: By subscribing, you agree to our privacy policy

hero.title: Break free from financial constraints
hero.subtitle: Empower yourself with practical tools and community-driven strategies. Transform your economic future through education, support, and collective action.

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.introRest: is a national nonprofit advancing financial wellness, economic empowerment, and self-sufficiency in underserved communities by delivering free, community-centered initiatives that help families build lasting financial confidence and freedom.
whoWeAre.mission: Advance financial wellness in underserved communities through free programs and tools that help build lasting financial confidence.
whoWeAre.vision: A future where every community has the resources and confidence to achieve financial freedom and generational progress.

pillars.title: Pillars
pillars.subtitle: Creative solutions crafted to tackle financial hurdles. We aim to overcome your monetary challenges.

billionDollarChallenge.name: Billion Dollar Challenge
billionDollarChallenge.description: The Billion Dollar Challenge (BDC) is a digital initiative of the DFREE® Global Foundation that helps individuals and organizations reduce debt and build savings through goal tracking, behavioral motivation, and community accountability, while providing partners with measurable, data-driven impact.

dfreeAfrica.name: DFREE® Global Foundation in Africa
dfreeAfrica.description: The DFREE® Global Foundation is deeply committed to advancing financial literacy, leadership development, and community empowerment across the African continent through strategic partnerships and targeted investments.

communityCampaigns.name: Community Campaigns
communityCampaigns.description: The DFREE® Global Foundation leads community-wide campaigns that unite churches, civic groups, and local organizations to deliver coordinated financial empowerment programs, fostering shared learning, accountability, and collective celebration through structured launches, weekly sessions, and culminating graduation events.

finfest.name: FinFe$t®: Where Wealth Meets Wellness
finfest.description: FinFe$t® is the DFREE® Global Foundation's signature free community event that blends financial education, health, and wellness through engaging experiences, equipping families with practical tools to drive holistic well-being and long-term prosperity.

accessScholarships.name: DFREE® Access Scholarships
accessScholarships.description: The DFREE® Scholarship Program provides need-based support that removes financial barriers to participation in the DFREE® journey, offering access to educational resources, digital learning, live training, and limited emergency assistance to help individuals pursue debt reduction and lasting financial freedom.

ourImpact.label: Our impact
ourImpact.title: Mapping our impact across communities
ourImpact.description: Every milestone represents lives transformed and hope restored.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.heading: Real stories of change
testimonials.subtitle: Voices that reveal the power of financial transformation

marcus.name: Marcus Rodriguez
marcus.title: Small business owner
marcus.text: My family has been able to pay off more than $260,000 in debt. The journey has been transformational, a blessing and a source of communion in fellowship.

elena.name: Elena Thompson
elena.title: Community leader
elena.text: I’ve been able to pay at least $65,000 off and save $5,000, which has helped me get back into the saving habit.

david.name: David Chen
david.title: Tech entrepreneur
david.text: Paid off 5 credit cards, no longer enslaved to debts and have become much more financially independent.

events.title: Upcoming gatherings
events.subtitle: Join us in our mission to transform financial landscapes.
